name: Pending Officer Review
query: SELECT name as "Application:Link/Consular Application:180", service as "Service:Link/Consular Service:200", assigned_officer as "Officer:Link/User:180", priority as "Priority:Data:100", modified as "Modified:Datetime:160" FROM `tabConsular Application` WHERE application_status IN ("Under Initial Review","Under Officer Review","Awaiting Interview") ORDER BY modified ASC
